subcodes.first_line: O ye who are intoxicated with the wine of the love of God, ye who are enraptured by the honey and sugar of the knowledge of God, ye lovers of Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مخموران باده محبت الله و ای محروران شهد و شکر معرفت الله و ای عاشقان جمال
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
